context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements browser-side Meta Pixel standard events with deduplication, uses subtotal for purchase value, and properly hashes PII for a customer audience sync function.

checklist.name: Pixel in <head>
checklist.description: The Meta Pixel base code is placed inside the HTML <head> element (not in the body or footer)

checklist.name: ViewContent event
checklist.description: Fires fbq('track', 'ViewContent', ...) on the product detail page with content_ids and value fields

checklist.name: AddToCart event
checklist.description: Fires fbq('track', 'AddToCart', ...) when a product is added to cart

checklist.name: Purchase event
checklist.description: Fires fbq('track', 'Purchase', ...) on the order confirmation page

checklist.name: content_type is 'product'
checklist.description: All standard events that include content_type use the value 'product' (not 'product_group' or other values)

checklist.name: Subtotal not total for value
checklist.description: The Purchase event uses order subtotal (pre-tax) for the value field, not the total including tax/shipping

checklist.name: eventID in Purchase pixel call
checklist.description: The Purchase fbq() call includes an eventID option (third argument object with eventID key) for deduplication

checklist.name: Matching dedup IDs
checklist.description: The eventID passed to fbq() and the eventId passed to CAPI use the same value for the same Purchase event

checklist.name: order_id in Purchase event
checklist.description: The Purchase pixel event includes order_id (or orderId) field in the event data

checklist.name: SHA-256 PII hashing
checklist.description: Customer PII (email, phone, name) is hashed with SHA-256 before being sent to any Meta API

checklist.name: Lowercase+trim before hashing
checklist.description: PII values are normalized to lowercase and trimmed of whitespace before SHA-256 hashing

checklist.name: Phone normalization
checklist.description: Phone numbers have non-digit characters removed (or are normalized to E.164 format) before hashing

checklist.name: CSP allows connect.facebook.net
checklist.description: The Content Security Policy configuration or documentation includes connect.facebook.net in an allowed domain list
